# CSSVG Editor — React (.tsx) Export Guidelines

> Feed this file to the AI when generating or modifying React export logic.
> These rules define exactly what the editor must output. **Never change the SVG animation logic** — only the wrapper shell is controlled here.

---

## 1. File Header

Every exported `.tsx` file must start with:

```tsx
"use client";

// Auto-generated by CSSVG Editor
// Drop into any Next.js / Vite + Tailwind v3+ project.
```

---

## 2. Props Interface

- Must be **exported**
- Named `{IconName}Props` in PascalCase matching the icon name
- Always includes exactly these 4 props:

```tsx
export interface ArrowRightProps {
  className?: string;
  size?: number;       // width & height in px — default: 40
  color?: string;      // stroke color       — default: "currentColor"
  strokeWidth?: number; // stroke thickness  — default: 2
}
```

---

## 3. Function Signature

- Default export
- Function name = PascalCase icon name (e.g. `ArrowRight`, `Settings`)
- All 4 props destructured with defaults
- `= {}` at the end so the component works with no props passed

```tsx
export default function ArrowRight({
  className = "",
  size = 40,
  color = "currentColor",
  strokeWidth = 2,
}: ArrowRightProps = {}) {
```

---

## 4. Wrapper `<div>` Rules

```tsx
<div
  className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden ${className}`}
  style={{ width: size, height: size, flexShrink: 0 }}
>
```

| Rule | Value |
|------|-------|
| Layout | `inline-flex items-center justify-center` — always |
| Clip | `overflow-hidden` — always |
| Size | `width: size, height: size` via inline style — always |
| flex-shrink | `flexShrink: 0` — always |
| ❌ Never | `relative w-full` |
| ❌ Never | `bg-white` or any background color |
| ❌ Never | `aspectRatio` |
| ❌ Never | Tailwind size classes like `w-10 h-10` |

---

## 5. `<svg>` Element Rules

```tsx
<svg
  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  viewBox="0 0 40 40"
  width={size}
  height={size}
  fill="none"
  aria-hidden="true"
>
```

| Rule | Value |
|------|-------|
| viewBox | `"0 0 40 40"` — always (canvas is 40×40) |
| width / height | `{size}` prop — always |
| fill | `"none"` — always |
| aria | `aria-hidden="true"` — always |
| ❌ Never | `width="100%" height="100%"` |
| ❌ Never | `className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full"` |
| ❌ Never | inline position styles |

---

## 6. SMIL Animation — Do Not Touch

The `<animateTransform>` and `<animate>` elements are owned by the editor.

- Keep them **100% as exported** — values, timing, keySplines, additive mode
- Do not convert to CSS `@keyframes`
- Do not simplify or remove any `<animateTransform>` even if values look static

---

## 7. Stroke Props on Shape Elements

Every `<path>`, `<circle>`, `<line>`, `<polyline>`, `<rect>` must use props — never hardcoded values:

```tsx
stroke={color}
strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
```

| Rule | ✅ Correct | ❌ Wrong |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Color | `stroke={color}` | `stroke="#bcbcbc"` |
| Width | `strokeWidth={strokeWidth}` | `strokeWidth={2}` |

All other stroke attributes (`strokeLinecap`, `strokeLinejoin`, `vectorEffect`) are kept as-is from the editor output.

---

## 8. `<style>` / KEYFRAME_CSS

- **Include** only if the component uses CSS `animation:` on elements
- **Omit** entirely if the component uses only SMIL `<animateTransform>` / `<animate>`
- Never inject a `<style>` block with unused keyframes

---

## 9. Complete Template

Use this as the exact shell for every new icon export:

```tsx
"use client";

// Auto-generated by CSSVG Editor
// Drop into any Next.js / Vite + Tailwind v3+ project.

export interface IconNameProps {
  className?: string;
  size?: number;
  color?: string;
  strokeWidth?: number;
}

export default function IconName({
  className = "",
  size = 40,
  color = "currentColor",
  strokeWidth = 2,
}: IconNameProps = {}) {
  return (
    <div
      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden ${className}`}
      style={{ width: size, height: size, flexShrink: 0 }}
    >
      <svg
        xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
        viewBox="0 0 40 40"
        width={size}
        height={size}
        fill="none"
        aria-hidden="true"
      >
        {/* ── editor SVG / SMIL content here, untouched ── */}

        <path
          d="..."
          stroke={color}
          strokeWidth={strokeWidth}
          vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"
        />

      </svg>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## 10. Quick Reference Checklist

Before finalising any export, verify every point:

- [ ] `"use client"` at top
- [ ] Props interface exported with all 4 props
- [ ] Function name matches icon name in PascalCase
- [ ] Default export
- [ ] Wrapper: `inline-flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden`
- [ ] Wrapper: `width: size, height: size, flexShrink: 0` in inline style
- [ ] No `bg-white` or background color anywhere
- [ ] SVG: `viewBox="0 0 40 40"` `width={size}` `height={size}` `fill="none"` `aria-hidden="true"`
- [ ] All `stroke` values use `{color}` prop
- [ ] All `strokeWidth` values use `{strokeWidth}` prop
- [ ] SMIL `<animateTransform>` / `<animate>` untouched
- [ ] No unused `<style>` blocks
